description: A funky, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and cute embellishments, this pair looks great with day or party wear.  The chiffon and net flower is a very feminine touch and will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 2"UpperSmooth footbed, ergonomically curved and lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleLeather look thong styled straps with a soft inner lining and fabric flower decorationHas a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleMidsoleEVA wedge midsoleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with texturing for ultimate grip even on smooth surfacesSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
